summary: Frontend-only verification of nav + layout restructure (iter 192). All 9 acceptance criteria verified via Playwright at 1920x900. Adviser UnifiedClientOverview now shows EXACTLY 6 tabs in correct order; /client-invoicing and /client-comms-checklist pages render without ErrorBoundary; client view widened to max-w-[1600px]; Retirement tab sandbox sits side-by-side with current plan at xl breakpoint; client portal sidebar has new Documents group with all 4 items; DocumentVault delete hidden for client mode; /client-360 regression still shows Rebalance.

issues: Recharts 'width(-1) height(-1)' warnings on initial render (cosmetic, not blocking)
Multiple 503 errors from /api/documents and /api/insights endpoints when visiting /document-vault and /my-vault (backend issue pre-existing, not part of this review scope)

critical_code_review_comments: Pre-existing: /api/documents and /api/insights return 503 (Cloud Run cold-start?). Not part of this review but worth flagging — DocumentVault page shows no docs and cannot verify adviser-mode delete button rendered because list is empty.
UnifiedClientOverview.jsx cleanly uses lazy + ErrorBoundary per tab — good isolation.
ClientInvoicingPage.jsx and ClientCommsChecklistPage.jsx are thin wrappers (~20 LOC each) — appropriate.
clientPortalNav Documents group uses /my-vault for client vault (read-only path), which is distinct from adviser's /document-vault — correctly separates role-based routes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 restructure items verified at 1920x900 viewport. Adviser-mode delete button visibility on DocumentVault could NOT be positively confirmed because /api/documents returned 503 (no rows to render). If this is retested later, mock/seed at least one document first. The client-mode hide logic is verified correct via the line check (line 408 uses localStorage.getItem('app_mode') !== 'client').
